lines.text: Joey and Rachel's, Joey is reading What to Expect When You're Expecting as Rachel enters from her bedroom.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Rach listen, did you know that during pregnancy your fingers swell up to twice their size and never go back.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (looking at her fingers) Oh my...God! Let me see that! (Grabs the book from him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughing) You fall for it every time!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I brought you my old maternity clothes! (Sets a bag on the counter.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Pheebs that's so sweet-(Grabs a pair of pants)-Ooh, those are so cute!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! And look, (Grabs the pants) see how they expand as the baby grows? (There's a stretchy part in front.) And then after the baby's born, they're great for shoplifting melons.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (entering) Oh good you're all here. Thanksgiving tomorrow, four o'clock. (To Rachel) Oh, guess who I invited. Remember that guy Will Colbert from high school?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He was in Ross's class...marching band...kinda overweight? Well, really overweight. I mean I was his thin friend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I don't remember him. Honey, are you sure you're not talking about your imaginary boyfriend.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No that was Jarred! Wow! I haven't thought about him in a long time... (Stares off into the distance lost in thought.) (Pause) Anyway, umm Will's, Will's here on business and he didn't have a place to go so I invited him here.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that's nice.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, and by the way, he's lost a bunch of weight. I mean he looks goo-ood! Okay, I mean really, really gorgeous! (Joey clears his throat.) I still love Chandler.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I just want you to say it once in a while.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right okay, just so you know, I'm not gonna make a turkey this year.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well Phoebe doesn't eat turkey...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Turkey's are beautiful, intelligent animals!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No they're not! They're ugly and stupid and delicious!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right! Okay, it's just Phoebe. Will's still on a diet, Chandler doesn't eat Thanksgiving food, and Rachel's having her aversion to poultry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: She is?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Remember I had to leave the room the other day when you had that roast chicken?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. But I thought that was because I put the whole thing on my hand and made it walk across the table.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Anyway, it just doesn't seem worth it to make a whole turkey for just three people. Okay? It's a lot of work.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But you gotta have turkey on Thanksgiving! I mean, Thanksgiving with no turkey is like-like Fourth of July with no apple pie! Or Friday with no two pizzas!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right fine! If it means that much to you! But just-there's gonna be a ton left over.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No there won't! I promise I will finish that turkey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, you're telling me you can eat an entire turkey in just one sitting?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's right! 'Cause I'm a Tribbiani! (To Rachel) And this is what we do! I mean we may not be great thinkers or world leaders, we don't read a lot or run very fast, but damnit! We can eat!
Opening Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is watching football, and it's actually the right game Green Bay at Detroit (although not this year's), as Monica is getting everything ready.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, isn't weird to think about how next year at this time they'll be a little baby at the table? (Chandler turns around in horror.) (Seeing him) Rachel's! But good to know where you're at!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You too!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Actually there is. Chandler usually helps me with this, but he's really into the game so I don't want to bother him. Could you help me fold these napkins? (Hands her a stack of them.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm gonna go across the hall to check on the yams.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. (She starts folding the napkins in half.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! No! No! No sweetie! No! Not like that! We're not at a barn dance. You've gotta-you wanna fold them like swans. Like I showed you at Christmas time, remember?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, it all just came screaming back to me. (Monica exits.) (To Chandler) So how's the game?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I have no idea.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! I'm just pretending to watch the game so I don't have to help out with stuff.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't believe you! That is...brilliant! And Monica has no idea?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nope! Every once and a while I just scream stuff at the TV.
Monica enters and Chandler screams stuff at the TV.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is your team winning hon?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! Anderson just scored again! (To Phoebe) There's no Anderson.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well I want to get in on this. Hey Mon? I don't think I can help you after all, I didn't realize this game was on.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I didn't know you liked football.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well normally I don't, but y'know...(looks at the TV)...Green Bay is playing.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You like Green Bay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well it's only like my favorite bay! {Actually, it's not bad. It just gets a little cold in winter, but in Wisconsin winter only lasts from August to June. J }
Phoebe joins Chandler on the couch as there is a knock on the door which Monica answers.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Hey!

Oh, I should point out that the live studio audience at this point goes absolutely wild. And I had absolutely no idea that this Will character was that popular! Maybe they should make him the seventh friend. Which would work out just fine since he's already married to one of them. Will is played by some guy named Brad Pitt, I guess he's some sort of actor.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Happy Thanksgiving!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Aww thanks! God Will I'm so glad that you came! You look great! You must've lost like...

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: 150 pounds. Yeah, I'm gonna be in one of those Subway sandwich commercials.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: A pie! (Will brought a pie.)

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Oh right. All right, it's no fat, it's no sugar, it's no dairy...it's no good. Throw it out.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You wanna meet some people? This is uh; this is my husband Chandler. Chandler, this is Will.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh hey. I'd shake your hand but uh; I'm really into the game. Plus, I think it'd be better for my ego if we didn't stand right next to each other.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (nonchalantly glancing) Hey. (Turns back around.) Wow! (Looks up.) Well done.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Will) Wanna give me a hand?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Sure! Monica, I can't get over how great you look! You look stunning!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well you look incredible too! You're just-you're so fit!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm watching the game, but I'm not deaf!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh umm, I meant to tell you, Ross is coming.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Ross is coming. Great! I love Ross!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Good. And Rachel Green too. (Will stops suddenly.)

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is there a problem?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Nope. Uh, it's okay. It's just uh, God I hated her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Yeah, I hated her. She was horrible to me in high school. But hey, it was a long time ago, I'm in a good place, it might be actually fun to see her again. You got any cakes or cookies or something? (Starts looking.) No Will no!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Phoebe) Y'know, it's been a while since we've screamed something. Maybe we should.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh come on!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Noooo!! Damn you ref! You burn in hell!!!
Joey enters eating potato chips.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, what are you doing? You gotta save room, you've got almost an entire turkey to eat.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Let me explain to you how the human body works. I have to warm my stomach first. Eatin' chips is like stretching.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Don't worry, Tribbianis never get full.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: I actually know what you're talking about. I'm here to tell you something my friend, you can eat and eat and eat but nothing will ever fill that void.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Monica) Who the hell is this guy?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Will! From high school.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Will) Joey.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Will!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey-hey you came! Man you look incredible! Hot stuff! (They hug and Ross realizes what he said.) Hot stuff?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: It's good to see you man.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, you too. Man, so-so what are you up to?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: I'm a commodities broker.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? Yeah that-that sounds interesting.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Yeah, it's not. But I'm rich and thin.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh! Man I don't think I've seen you since uh, Lance Davis' graduation party.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: That was such a fun night!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. It would've been good if we had gotten in, but still real fun.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: God we were lame back then. Do you remember how into dinosaurs we were?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughs) Yeah.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: So what do you, what do you do now?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So how long are you in town?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering, carrying a baking dish) Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey sweetie. Oh good. (Takes the baking dish from her.)

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: (glaring at Rachel) Rachel Green.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Aw-oh, that's right. Are-are you gonna be okay?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Oh, I'll-I'll be fine. Just God I hate her Ross! I hate her!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Will, high school was-was a long time ago.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Look at her standing there with those yams! My two greatest enemies Ross: Rachel Green and complex carbohydrates.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (sees Will) Oh my God Monica, who is that?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's Will from high school!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! I do not remember him! Wow! He's really got that sexy, smoldering thing going on. (We see Will angrily staring at Rachel.) Oh my God, he's... Look at the way he's just staring at me. I think he's trying to mouth something to me, but I can't make it out. (Will mouths, "I hate you.")

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, dinner's ready!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Good game!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. Solid effort. Solid effort.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, so who won?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (simultaneously) Green Bay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (simultaneously) Detroit.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well the Lions technically won, but it was a moral victory for the Green Bay...Mermen.
They sit down at the table and Will goes to talk to Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! Will, right?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! I'm Rachel Green.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Oh I-I remember you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?! Aren't you sweet! I gotta tell you though, I am, I am having the hardest time placing you. Oh-oh hang on! Did we umm, did we fool around at Lance Davis' graduation party?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: You are unbelievable.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (breaking it up) Uh Rachel? Rachel, why don't you sit here? (Next to Joey) And Will you sit way over there. (The other side of the table.)
Monica sets something on the table and removes the cover. It kinda looks like turkey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's it?! Even if nobody helps me I can eat that no problem. At least give me a challenge!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (laughs) This is Chandler's chicken. This is the turkey. (Sets down a huge turkey.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (quietly) Oh. How-how big is that?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: About nineteen pounds.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Rachel) It's like me when I was born.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, who would uh, like some yams? Will?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Oh, you'd like that wouldn't ya?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? (Joey starts offering Ross some turkey.) Oh y'know what? Can we please keep the chicken and the turkey and everything on the other side of the table? The smell is just yuck!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: (sneeze talks) Typical.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry. What?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: I said it was typical. Typical of you, Rachel Green, Queen Rachel does whatever she wants in little Rachel land. (Does a fake hair flip.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Monica) Seriously, who is this guy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Umm, I'm sorry. Do you-do you have a problem with me?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: I don't know? Do I? Do I?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I think you do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Rachel) Apparently you were umm, a little mean to him in high school.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: A little mean? You made my life miserable!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm-I'm-I had no idea. I'm sorry. I...

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Well you should be. Screw it! Bring on the yams!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh Will. But you-you've worked so hard...

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Yams!!!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (Chandler grabs the dish from Monica and hands it to Will who starts dishing out a large helping.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh Will umm, I just want to say that I'm real sorry for whatever I-I did to you in high school...

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Oh, it wasn't just me. We had a club!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You had a club?!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: That's right, The I Hate Rachel Green Club!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Whoa! My God! So what, you all just joined together to hate me?! Who else was in this club?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Me and Ross. (Points at Ross.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No need to point, she knows who Ross is.
Commercial Break
Monica and Chandler's, scene continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Ross) So you were in an I Hate Rachel club?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Yes he was. (Holds up his hand for a high-five.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So who else was in this club?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh actually, there-there was also that exchange student from Thailand but I-I don't think he-he knew what it was.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So Ross, we went out for two years, and you never told me you were in an I Hate Rachel club.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: You went out with her?! We had a pact!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That was in high school! It's not like it was binding forever.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Then why did it have the word eternity in it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay Monica, did you know about this?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I swear I didn't. (To Ross and Will) Hey! Is that why you guys used to go up to your bedroom and lock the door?

lines.speaker: Ross and Will
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hmm, a little relieved, I gotta say.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look Rach I-I'm sorry, okay? I...I was a stupid kid, okay? The only reason I joined...

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Co-founded!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...co-founded. Co-founded the club was because I was insanely in love with you. Obviously I didn't handle it very well. But if you think about it the I Hate Rachel Club was really the I Love Rachel Club.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Uh, except that it was really the I Hate Rachel Club.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. So what? You guys would just like get together and like just say mean things about me?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Well, we did a little more than that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no! No-no. No-no.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?! What else did you do?

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: We started a rumor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What rumor?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, come on Will! Just take off your shirt and tell us!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It was no big deal. We-we...said that the rumor was...that umm...you had both...male and female reproductive parts.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: That's right! We said your parents flipped a coin, decided to raise you as a girl, but you still had a hint of a penis.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You started that?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! You heard that?! (Goes and stands behind Joey.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Everyone at our school heard it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Everybody at my school heard it! You were the hermaphrodite cheerleader from Long Island?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no!!!! Oh my God!! This is all making so much sense to me now! This is why Adam Carter wouldn't go out with me! This is why Billy Tratt would just stay in this region! (Motions to her breasts.) (Joey has turned around.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Actually, Billy Tratt is gay now. So-so that one's not really our fault.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica, how come you never told me this?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I thought it might be true. And I was afraid that you were gonna cry and then show it to me.
Joey is now looking at Rachel, and since Rachel's standing and he's sitting down and he's not looking at her face... You get the picture.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey stop staring! There's nothing there! It's not true!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm afraid I'm gonna need proof.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! (Hits him and storms out.)
[Time Lapse, dinner has ended for everyone except Joey who looks like to have finished the turkey, until he turns the plate around and reveals he only ate one side.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You are my Everest.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey, you don't have to finish that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yes I do. Otherwise what's next? Today I'm just a guy who can't finish a turkey, but tomorrow I'm the guy who eats half a Powerbar, wraps up the rest, and puts in the fridge? No! No, I just...I just-I gotta change my pants. (Gets up and heads for the door.) Jeans have no give. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering carrying a book) Okay! Okay! Listen to what Sean McMahon wrote in my yearbook senior year, "Dear Rach, you're such a good person." Not girl! Person!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rach, I think you're reading a little too much into it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (reading what he wrote again) "Dear Rach, you're a great person. Sorry about your tiney-wienie." (Will laughs.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, what do you want me to do? Do you want me to call everyone in the entire school and tell them it wasn't true?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Could you also tell them I'm skinny now?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh! Me too!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well look-look I'm not calling anybody! Okay? It was like a million years ago!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't care how long ago it was! You told people that I was half and half! Y'know what? I just want to point out I never did anything to hurt you in high school.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's not totally true.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well you-you did start that rumor about Ross making out with Mrs. Altman, our 50-year-old librarian.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shocked) (To Rachel) How did you know that?!!!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's true?!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes it is! I saw you guys going at it behind the card catalog!
Ross is at a loss for words.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Mrs. Altman? She also made out with Takaka Ci-Kek the night before he went back to Thailand.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sorry. When you were in high school you made out with a 50-year-old woman?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! She didn't look 50!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Did she look 16?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, there's a picture of her in the yearbook actually.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! (They all look.) Wow!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She didn't photograph well!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, she probably wasn't familiar with the process having spent most of her life sitting for oil paintings!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So how did this happen? Did she, did she lure you to an early bird dinner?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I was working late in the library one afternoon. It was just the two of us. She needed some help with her word jumble. And one thing led to another. If you must know, Anita was very gentle and tender. May she rest in peace...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Didn't she walk with a cane?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Only when it was damp!! (To Rachel) I can't believe you-you told people about this?! Everybody knew?! Y'know what? (To Will) I'm back in the club!

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Yeah! (They high-five.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I wanna join!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wh-Phoebe!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I never got to be in a club. I-I didn't go to high school, but three of us would meet behind a dumpster to learn French. Bonjour.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, y'know-Fine! You guys have your stupid little club, but I would just like to say is what you did to me is way worse than what I did to you! You gave me a tiney-wienie! (Will laughs.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, listen you're just being silly. Rachel, even with that rumor you were one of the most popular girls in school and everyone wanted to be like you. One girl wanted to be like you so much she stuffed her pants with a Tootsie Roll!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And Ross, if it weren't for Rachel's rumor I mean no one in high school would even know who you were. She put you on the map!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: As a romancer of the elderly.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Mrs. Altman was the kind of woman you could tell she used to be pretty.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The eyes...did still sparkle.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey guys this stuff is just so way in the past. You-you've been through so much since then. And right now you've got so much more important stuff going on in your life. Can't you just let this go?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She's right.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. I mean we are having a baby together.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Hold on! You got her pregnant?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: Are ya getting married?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Will
lines.text: So you knocked her up but you're not gonna marry her. Dude! (Wants another high-five and Ross ignores him.) Anybody?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. (Goes over and hugs him.) It's exactly how I'd imagined it would be.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering, wearing the maternity pants from earlier) All right where's that turkey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey! Those are my maternity pants!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Not now! These are my Thanksgiving pants!
Closing Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Will has left and the rest of the gang is watching Joey finish the turkey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well that's it. I'm done. Whew! (Wipes his forehead.) There come the meat sweats. (Chandler hands him a towel and he wipes his face.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well Joey, we're all...we're all very proud of you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, I believe we can expect a call from the President any moment now.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Is there anything we can do for you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No just, nobody press on my stomach.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You can keep those pants by the way.
Joey notices Monica has gotten a pie.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa-hey-wh-wh-what do you got there? What is that? Pie?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, you want some?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah, just cut me a little sliver. (Monica prepares to cut a little sliver.) A little bigger. (Monica prepares to cut a bigger piece.) Little bigger. (Monica moves the knife again.) What?! Are you afraid you're gonna run out?! Cut me a real piece!
End
